title: SEO Basics: What Is SEO?
description: Learn what SEO is and why it matters for Google rankings.
content:
SEO means Search Engine Optimization. It helps your website rank higher on Google's blue-link results.

Why SEO matters?

More rankings = more traffic = more customers. SEO earns clicks in traditional search.

Key SEO tactics?

Domain authority, backlinks, page experience, topical relevance.

title: Keyword Research for SEO
description: How to find the right keywords for your SEO strategy.
content:
Keyword research is the foundation of SEO. Find keywords your audience searches for.

How to find keywords?

Use tools like Google Keyword Planner, Ahrefs, SEMrush. Look for high volume + low competition.
